entries.title: Inbox Never Empty? Email Focus Timer | Superfocus
entries.description: Batch email in 15-min Sprint blocks. Reduce reactivity. Free Pomodoro timer.
entries.h1: You've checked email fourteen times. Inbox: still full.
entries.painPoints:
Check email. Lose hour.
Never batch. Always react.
Inbox owns you.
entries.heroSubtitle: Reactive email mode makes everyone else's priorities yours. Deep work never gets a turn.
entries.painSolution:
Two 15-min email blocks daily.
Timer ends = inbox closed.
Take control back.

entries.title: Research Rabbit Holes? Structured Focus Timer | Superfocus
entries.description: Time-box research dives. Pomodoro for reading, breaks for synthesis. Try Superfocus free.
entries.h1: Three hours of "research" produced forty open tabs and zero notes.
entries.painPoints:
Open tab. Open tab. Open tab.
No synthesis. No output.
Research theater.
entries.heroSubtitle: Rabbit holes feel productive until you close the laptop with nothing synthesized.
entries.painSolution:
25 min read. 5 min notes.
Repeat. Synthesize.
Research becomes insight.

entries.title: Content Deadline Looming? Writing Focus Timer | Superfocus
entries.description: Pomodoro for drafting, Marathon for long writes. Rain sounds included. Free.
entries.h1: Draft due Friday. Word count: zero on Wednesday.
entries.painPoints:
Deadline closer. Still not started.
Perfectionism paralysis.
Publish date wins.
entries.heroSubtitle: Creating content requires starting, and starting requires protected time you never block.
entries.painSolution:
Bad first draft in 25 min.
Timer forces start.
Edit later. Ship on time.

entries.title: Brainstorm Going Nowhere? Time-Box It | Superfocus
entries.description: 15-min Sprint for idea bursts. Generate, then decide. Free focus timer.
entries.h1: The brainstorm has been going for an hour. No decisions made.
entries.painPoints:
Ideas everywhere. Decision nowhere.
Meeting runs long.
Nothing captured.
entries.recommendedSounds: Cafe or ambient for creative flow
entries.heroSubtitle: Unlimited ideation becomes unlimited wandering. Ideas scatter without time boundaries.
entries.painSolution:
15 min generate. 5 min pick top 3.
Time box saves meetings.
Ideas become action.

entries.title: Admin Scattered All Day? Batch With a Timer | Superfocus
entries.description: Sprint blocks for filing, data entry, updates. Batch admin, free time for deep work. Free.
entries.h1: Admin tasks eat your day in bites too small to notice.
entries.painPoints:
Death by small tasks.
Admin expands.
Deep work shrinks.
entries.heroSubtitle: Five minutes here, ten there—by evening you've done chores all day and avoided real work.
entries.painSolution:
One 15-min admin block.
Batch everything.
Rest of day: real work.

entries.title: Reviews Piling Up? Focus Timer for Code & Docs | Superfocus
entries.description: 25-min Pomodoro per review batch. Full attention, fewer misses. Free.
entries.h1: Seventeen PRs waiting. You've reviewed none with full attention.
entries.painPoints:
Skim reviews. Ship bugs.
No time for thorough.
Queue grows.
entries.heroSubtitle: Shallow skimming isn't review—it's how bugs ship. Thorough review needs focused blocks.
entries.painSolution:
One PR per pomodoro.
Full attention. Complete review.
Queue shrinks daily.

entries.title: No Time to Plan? Weekly Review Timer | Superfocus
entries.description: Sprint or Pomodoro for weekly review and daily planning. Block it before the week blocks you. Free.
entries.h1: You planned to plan your week. It's Thursday.
entries.heroSubtitle: Without blocked planning time, every day starts reactive. Goals drift. Priorities blur.
entries.painSolution:
Monday: 25 min planning.
Before email. Before meetings.
Week runs you less.
